summary: Strong answer that clearly distinguishes passive PL/RMCD probing from active optical pumping/control and includes integer and fractional Chern states. Main claims are supported by the supplied graph nodes. However, it adds several details not present in the supplied context, including local compressibility/magneto-optics bulk evidence, spatially resolved bulk-edge probing, and domain-wall writing/bistate cycling, so faithfulness and citation quality are not perfect.
